testcase.name: test_program_has_required_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing field: program_type assert 'program_type' in {'description': 'Essential commands and manners for your dog - sit, stay, come, heel, and leash walking.', 'duration': '6 weeks', 'id': 'prog_basic_obedience', 'image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1587300003388-59208cc962cb?w=800', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_learn_pillar.py:55: in test_program_has_required_fields assert field in program, f"Missing field: {field}" E AssertionError: Missing field: program_type E assert 'program_type' in {'description': 'Essential commands and manners for your dog - sit, stay, come, heel, and leash walking.', 'duration': '6 weeks', 'id': 'prog_basic_obedience', 'image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1587300003388-59208cc962cb?w=800', ...}
